title: In Tariff Refund Process, First Payment Set to Go Out May 11
title_cn: 关税退款流程中，第一笔付款将于 5 月 11 日发出
summary: The Trump administration said the first tariff refund payment is set to go out around May 11, even as thousands of US importers encounter issues with a new online portal designed to handle claims on the $166 billion in duties that were overturned by the Supreme Court.

title: Starmer’s Post-Election Survival Strategy Takes Shape as the Iran War Goes Long
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争的持续，斯塔默的选举后生存战略逐渐成形
summary: Starmer’s post-election survival strategy takes shape as the Iran war goes on longer than expected.

title: Treasuries Slump as Fed Dissents Spur Wagers on 2027 Rate Hike
title_cn: 美联储异议刺激人们押注 2027 年加息，国债暴跌
summary: Treasuries slumped, with two-year yields rising the most on a Federal Reserve decision day since 2022, as traders boosted bets the central bank may need to raise interest rates amid persistent inflation pressures.

title: Yen Falls Below 160 Per Dollar to Weakest Mark Since 2024
title_cn: 日元跌破 160 美元兑 2024 年以来最低水平
summary: The yen extended its slide beyond 160 per dollar to its weakest mark this year, fueling risk that Japanese officials may step into the market to offer support.

title: Ford CFO on Q1 Earnings, Outlook and Impact of Gas Prices
title_cn: 福特首席财务官谈第一季度盈利、前景和汽油价格的影响
summary: Ford CFO Sherry House discusses first-quarter earnings, SUV and pick-up truck sales amid higher gas prices and the automaker's full-year outlook on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India’s Homegrown $1 Billion High-Speed Trading Unicorn Goes Global
title_cn: 印度本土10亿美元高速交易独角兽走向全球
summary: Graviton is expanding in Singapore and London as competition and regulatory hurdles build in its home market.

title: Mamdani vs. Griffin Standoff Puts $6 Billion Tower at Risk
title_cn: Mamdani 与 Griffin 对峙使价值 60 亿美元的大厦面临风险
summary: Citadel’s Ken Griffin said he’s meeting with New York Governor Kathy Hochul on Thursday to talk about the future direction of America’s biggest city after a spat with Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s over Griffin's $238 million Manhattan penthouse. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasury Yields Climb as Fed Split Amid War Risks: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美联储因战争风险而分裂，国债收益率攀升：市场结束
summary: Wall Street traders drove bonds lower and stocks wavered as a divided Federal Reserve held rates steady and signaled the war in Iran is clouding the economic outlook. Brent crude hit the highest since 2022.

title: Divided Fed Likely to Continue, BlackRock's Rosenberg Says
title_cn: 贝莱德罗森伯格表示，美联储可能会继续分裂
summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the systematic multi-strategy fund at BlackRock, says the market took the Federal Reserve easing bias out at the onset of the war in Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: When Will Jerome Powell Leave the Fed?
title_cn: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔何时离开美联储？
summary: Fed Chair Jerome Powell said he intends to remain at the central bank as a member of its Board of Governors, but it's not clear when he'll leave completely. Jim Bianco of Bianco Research says Powell could stick around as a disruptor. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly | Season 4 Trailer
title_cn: 与亚历克斯·罗德里格斯和杰森·凯利的交易 |第 4 季预告片
summary: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly showcases intimate conversations with business titans and sports champions that reveal their investment philosophies, missed opportunities and more.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Mixed as Oil Jumps, Fed Holds Rates Before Earnings
title_cn: 油价上涨，美股涨跌互现，美联储在财报公布前维持利率不变
summary: US equities closed mixed amid volatile trading on Wednesday as oil prices surged and a standoff between the US and Iran over the Strait of Hormuz escalated. Investors also assessed a split policy decision by the Federal Reserve while awaiting earnings from four megacap companies that were released after the bell.

title: BP and Venezuela Sign Pact to Explore for Offshore Gas
title_cn: 英国石油公司与委内瑞拉签署勘探海上天然气协议
summary: BP Plc and Venezuela agreed on a deal to explore for natural gas offshore as the South American country’s energy revival gathers pace following the US capture of Nicolas Maduro.

title: Bloomberg Deals 4/29/2026
title_cn: 彭博社优惠 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Pershing Square CEO & Founder Bill Ackman, LionTree Advisors Managing Director Ariel Granoff,  Cain Co-Founder & CEO Jonathan Goldstein, Boston Consulting Managing Director & Partner Travel, Transport & Leisure Tom McCaleb, and AstraZeneca CFO Aradhana Sarin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: War, Fuel Prices Seen Steering Travel Industry Toward M&A
title_cn: 战争、燃油价格推动旅游业走向并购
summary: War in Iran and higher oil prices can be expected to keep tourists closer to home, disrupting the travel and hospitality industry and potentially spurring dealmaking.

title: Mamdani vs. Griffin Standoff Puts $6 Million Tower at Risk
title_cn: 马姆达尼 (Mamdani) 与格里芬 (Griffin) 对峙使价值 600 万美元的大厦面临风险
summary: Citadel’s Ken Griffin said he’s meeting with New York Governor Kathy Hochul on Thursday to talk about the future direction of America’s biggest city after a spat with Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s over Griffin's $238 million Manhattan penthouse (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Charges Toward $120 With No End in Sight to US-Iran War
title_cn: 美伊战争尚未结束，油价逼近 120 美元
summary: Oil surged to the highest since June 2022, with no end in sight to the US-Iran conflict or choked-off energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz, heightening concerns over a rapidly shrinking global supply cushion.

title: Opportunity in Small, Midcap Travel M&A: LionTree
title_cn: 中小型旅游并购机会：LionTree
summary: Ariel Granoff, managing director of LionTree Advisors, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Need To Invest in Distinctive Travel Brands: Cain CEO
title_cn: 需要投资独特的旅游品牌：凯恩首席执行官
summary: Jonathan Goldstein, co-founder & CEO of Cain International, discusses the importance of focusing on both brand strength and operational excellence when investing in luxury assets with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Significant Airline M&A on the Horizon: McCaleb
title_cn: 即将发生的重大航空公司并购：McCaleb
summary: Tom McCaleb, managing director & partner of travel, transport, & leisure at Boston Consulting Group Transport, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Powell Says He Has 'No Choice' But to Stay at Fed
title_cn: 鲍威尔称他“别无选择”只能留在美联储
summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell says concerns about recent legal attacks on the central bank has led him to the decision to stay at the institution and will leave when it is appropriate to do so. While Powell’s term as Fed chair ends on May 15, his seat on the Board of Governors doesn’t expire until 2028. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Falls for Third Day as Iran War Heightens Inflation Risks
title_cn: 伊朗战争加剧通胀风险，金价连续第三天下跌
summary: Gold extended a decline with the indefinite closure of the Strait of Hormuz continuing to heighten inflation risks and the Federal Reserve signaling the war in Iran is clouding the economic outlook.

title: Trump Argues UAE’s OPEC Exit Could Lower Energy Prices Amid War
title_cn: 特朗普认为阿联酋退出欧佩克可能会在战争期间降低能源价格
summary: US President Donald Trump said the United Arab Emirates’ decision to leave OPEC would help lower energy prices, which have spiked due to the war in Iran and continue to climb.

title: Copper Slips as Traders Weigh Iran War Impact, China Demand
title_cn: 交易商权衡伊朗战争影响和中国需求，铜价下跌
summary: Copper edged lower as investors weighed the ongoing risks that the Iran war poses to global growth against the outlook for demand in top buyer China.

title: JetBlue, Booking Give Mixed Update on Travel Demand
title_cn: 捷蓝航空、预订部门对旅行需求的最新情况好坏参半
summary: Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals" discusses travel demand as fuel prices soar amid the Iran War. This week JetBlue, Booking Holdings, and Hilton gave mixed commentary on future demand for travel.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Moving Towards Symmetrical Policy, JPMorgan's Michele Says
title_cn: 摩根大通的米歇尔表示，美联储正在转向对称政策
summary: "The Fed would be nuts not to move to a symmetrical posture," Bob Michele, global head of fixed income at JPMorgan Asset Management, says on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sun Pharma, Lilly Lead Latest Healthcare Deal Rush
title_cn: Sun Pharma 和礼来公司引领最新的医疗保健交易热潮
summary: Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals" wraps up recent pharma dealmaking. Eli Lilly agreed to buy closely held Ajax Therapeutics for as much as $2.3 billion in cash. Sun Pharmaceutical Industries has agreed to acquire New York-listed women’s health-care company Organon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Can Stay on Hold This Year, JPMorgan's Michele Says
title_cn: 摩根大通的米歇尔表示，美联储今年可能会按兵不动
summary: Bob Michele, global head of fixed income at JPMorgan Asset Management, says the inflation risk posed by the Iran conflict means the Federal Reserve can stay on hold through year-end on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Leaves Rates Unchanged, Four Officials Dissent
title_cn: 美联储维持利率不变，四名官员持不同意见
summary: The Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged in a range of 3.5% to 3.75%. But four officials voted against the decision. It’s the first time since 1992 that there were four dissents. Bloomberg’s Michael McKee reports.

title: Iran Having a Nuclear Weapon is a 'Real Danger To The World' Says Sen. Moore Capito
title_cn: 参议员摩尔·卡皮托表示，伊朗拥有核武器是“对世界的真正威胁”
summary:
Republican Senator Shelley Moore Capito joined Balance of Power to discuss the tension in around talks in the Middle East as well as looming FISA expiration. Sen. Moore Capito said the section of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act that is about to expire is an essential tool for the US to investigate and head off foreign threats.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kone Agrees to Buy TK Elevator for $34.4B
title_cn: 通力同意以 $34.4B 收购 TK Elevator
summary: Bloomberg's Liana Baker joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Kone agreed to acquire TK Elevator for $34.4 billion including debt, transforming the Finnish company into the industry’s dominant player and putting new pressure on its rivals. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Latest Tech Earnings Signal for Apple, Nvidia
title_cn: 苹果和英伟达的最新科技盈利信号是什么
summary: Daniel Flax, Neuberger senior research analyst, discusses what the latest round of tech earnings could portend for AI companies like Apple, Broadcom and Nvidia on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Shares Plunge on Escalating Concerns Over AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 由于对人工智能支出热潮的担忧不断升级，Meta 股价暴跌
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. shares slid after the company raised its spending outlook for the year, reigniting fears that the historic levels of investment it’s making to catch up in the artificial intelligence race won’t pay off.

title: Microsoft Cloud Growth Fails to Ease Investors’ AI Concerns
title_cn: 微软云计算的增长未能缓解投资者对人工智能的担忧
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s cloud business reported growth that narrowly beat analysts’ estimates, disappointing investors concerned that the company isn’t fully capitalizing on demand for AI services.

title: Meta Shares Plunge as AI Investments Raise Spending Outlook
title_cn: 人工智能投资提升支出前景，Meta 股价暴跌
summary:
Meta Platforms Inc. shares slid after the company raised its spending outlook for the year, reigniting fears that the historic levels of investment it’s making to build artificial intelligence models won’t pay off.
The social-media giant projected full-year capital expenditures between $125 billion and $145 billion, far exceeding analysts’ estimates and marking a roughly 7.4% increase from what the company had previously projected. The company is dealing with “higher component pricing” and additional data center costs, Chief Financial Officer Susan Li said in a statement. Bloomberg's Kurt Wagner joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The 10 Billion Startup Training AI To Do Your Job
title_cn: 100 亿初创公司培训 AI 来完成你的工作
summary: San Francisco tech startup, Mercor, is hiring high-skilled workers for a massive undertaking: teaching AI how to do their jobs. On today’s Big Take podcast, reporter Tom Foster and host Sarah Holder break down how Mercor’s college-dropout founders built a $10 billion company aimed at automating the white-collar world. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet Sales Beat Estimates on Google Cloud, AI Customers
title_cn: Alphabet 谷歌云、人工智能客户的销售额超出预期
summary: Alphabet Inc. reported quarterly revenue and profit that beat projections, fueled by strong growth in its cloud computing unit, signaling that the internet giant’s unprecedented investments in AI infrastructure are beginning to pay off.

title: Amazon Reports Higher Spending to Fuel Cloud Unit Sales
title_cn: 亚马逊报告增加支出以推动云单位销售
summary: Amazon.com Inc. spent more than anticipated to expand data center capacity in the quarter, fueling the fastest sales growth for its cloud unit in more than three years.

title: Luria Sees Good Signs Ahead for Big Tech After Earnings
title_cn: 卢里亚在财报公布后看到大型科技公司未来的良好迹象
summary: DA Davidson Managing Director Gil Luria offers his key takeaways on earnings from Amazon, Microsoft and Meta Platforms. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US House Probes Airbnb, Anysphere’s Use of Chinese AI Models
title_cn: 美国众议院调查 Airbnb 和 Anysphere 使用中国人工智能模型
summary: House Republicans are investigating American technology companies’ use of Chinese artificial intelligence models, part of a broader push by Congress to limit US national security risks and to counter Beijing in the global AI race.

title: Qualcomm Rallies After Touting Data Center Client, China Rebound
title_cn: 高通在大力宣传数据中心客户后股价上涨，中国市场反弹
summary: Qualcomm Inc. rallied in late trading after the company said it was making headway in the lucrative data center market and predicted that the China phone industry will bounce back.

title: Stripe’s Push to Bring AI to Payments, Commerce
title_cn: Stripe 致力于将人工智能引入支付和商业领域
summary: Stripe announced several new AI tools Wednesday, including a new partnership with Google, aimed at building AI tools for payments and commerce. Stripe President and co-founder John Collison discusses the company’s AI strategy with Bloomberg Tech's Ed Ludlow.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Recounts Losing Trust in Motives of OpenAI’s Other Leaders
title_cn: 马斯克讲述了对 OpenAI 其他领导者动机失去信任的经历
summary: Elon Musk spent hours Wednesday telling a jury about his falling out with the other leaders of OpenAI over what he described as their desire to “get rich” off a project that was supposed to serve the public good.

title: 80 Seconds of Big Tech Earnings To Set Market’s Fate | Bloomberg Tech 4/29/2026
title_cn: 80 秒大型科技公司财报决定市场命运 |彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss expectations for big tech earnings as investors prepare for Microsoft, Meta, Google, and Amazon to report earnings after the market closes. Plus, SoFi CEO Anthony Noto discusses investors' reaction to the financial services company’s earnings as its shares fall. And, Elon Musk continues testifying in his suit against OpenAI over the startup's pivot from a charity to a for-profit business.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoFi Shares Fall on Higher-Than-Expected Expenses
title_cn: SoFi 股价因支出高于预期而下跌
summary: SoFi shares fell after the company released its quarterly results. SoFi CEO Anthony Noto says investors appear to be reading its decision to maintain its full-year guidance as a sign of uncertainty. Noto speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta’s Need for Gas Power Boosts Entergy Spending by $14 Billion
title_cn: Meta 对天然气发电的需求使企业支出增加了 140 亿美元
summary: US utility Entergy Corp. boosted its four-year capital spending plan by nearly a third to $57 billion, mainly to build natural gas-fired power plants for Meta Platforms Inc.’s massive data center development in northern Louisiana.

title: Apple to Add AI-Powered Photo-Editing Tools
title_cn: 苹果将​​添加人工智能照片编辑工具
summary: Apple is planning a major overhaul of the built-in photo-editing features, powered by its Apple Intelligence platform, according to people familiar with the plans. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Tech Faces Make or Break Moment | Open Interest 4/29/2026
title_cn: 科技巨头的成败时刻未平仓合约 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." 80 seconds that could set the market’s next move—Alphabet, Amazon, Meta and Microsoft all reporting after the bell. Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol joins Open Interest on fixing mobile orders and boosting consistency. A major Supreme Court ruling reshapes voting maps. Booking CEO Glenn Fogel on war-driven travel disruptions. Marsh CEO John Doyle on soaring insurance costs in the Hormuz crisis. And TD Cowen’s John Blackledge on whether Big Tech’s AI spending boom is reaching its limit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FCC to Review Disney-Owned TV Licenses Early
title_cn: FCC 将提前审查迪士尼拥有的电视许可证
summary: The Federal Communications Commission said it would do an early review of the licenses for eight Disney-owned TV stations. The move is tied to an investigation into the company’s diversity policy, but comes after a feud between President Donald Trump and ABC late-night host Jimmy Kimmel kicked back up. Bloomberg's Kelcee Griffis joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 80 Seconds of Big Tech Earnings Will Decide Stock Market’s Fate
title_cn: 80秒的科技巨头盈利将决定股市的命运
summary: Investors looking for clues on which direction the stock market is headed in the coming weeks will get a rapid-fire reading as soon as trading ends on Wednesday.

title: Apple Plans a Siri Camera Mode and Upgraded Visual AI in iOS 27
title_cn: 苹果计划在 iOS 27 中加入 Siri 相机模式并升级视觉 AI
summary: Apple Inc. is planning to embed artificial intelligence more deeply into the iPhone’s camera app, adding a new Siri mode alongside the standard photo and video options in its upcoming iOS 27 operating system.

title: Motorola Raises Pricing of New Razr Phones in Pivotal Year for Foldables
title_cn: 摩托罗拉在可折叠手机的关键年提高了新款 Razr 手机的定价
summary: The company’s clamshell phones have gone up by as much as $200, while its first book-style foldable barely undercuts Samsung at $1,900.

title: Global Agents ID 100 Child Abuse Victims as AI Floods Case Files
title_cn: AI 泛滥导致全球特工发现 100 名儿童虐待受害者案件档案
summary: Operation Renewed Hope brought together victim identification specialists from 29 countries.

title: Blackstone Plans Overhaul With Focus on New AI Unit
title_cn: 黑石计划进行全面改革，重点关注新的人工智能部门
summary: Blackstone Inc. is folding its growth business into a new West Coast-based division that will focus solely on the alternative investment giant’s artificial intelligence portfolio, which includes OpenAI and Anthropic PBC.

title: IBM to Add 750 Jobs in AI, Quantum Computing at Chicago Tech Hub
title_cn: IBM 将在芝加哥科技中心新增 750 个人工智能和量子计算职位
summary: International Business Machines Corp. is deepening its bet on the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park in Chicago, with plans to add 750 jobs over the next five years.

title: Chinese Hackers Spied On Cuban Embassy As US Prepared Blockade
title_cn: 美国准备封锁之际，中国黑客监视古巴大使馆
summary: Chinese hackers breached Cuba’s embassy in Washington to spy on communications of dozens of diplomats as the island nation stared down a US naval blockade, according to findings from the cyber firm Gambit Security.

title: Uber Adds Hotel Bookings to Its App Through New Expedia Partnership
title_cn: Uber 通过新的 Expedia 合作伙伴将酒店预订添加到其应用程序中
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is adding hotel bookings in its flagship app, marking the ride-hail company’s biggest push yet into the travel market as it seeks to create an everything platform.

title: China Threatens EU With Retaliation if It Bans Huawei Gear
title_cn: 中国威胁欧盟如果禁止华为设备将进行报复
summary: China said it would retaliate against the European Union if it proceeds with a proposal to ban Huawei Technologies Co.’s equipment across the continent, escalating tensions in the long-running clash over national security and the communications company’s products.

title: Will Doomscrolling Come to an End?
title_cn: 末日卷轴会结束吗？
summary: A new European proposal is trying to put an end to doomscrolling. It’s a worthy goal, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Parmy Olson. But will it happen? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cyberattack on NJ School Forces Debt Sale to Cover Stolen Funds
title_cn: 新泽西州学校遭受网络攻击迫使出售债务以弥补被盗资金
summary: A cyberattack that stole $4.8 million in taxpayer money has spurred a New Jersey suburb to issue short-term debt as officials try to recover the funds.

title: NXP Posts Record 25% Gain as Stronger Auto Market Boosts Outlook
title_cn: 汽车市场走强提振前景，恩智浦股价上涨 25%，创历史新高
summary: NXP Semiconductors NV shares jumped the most since its 2010 market debut after giving an upbeat revenue forecast, a sign the chipmaker is bouncing back from a prolonged auto industry slump and tariff uncertainties.

title: Bessent Says Powell Staying On Is ‘Violation’ of All Fed Norms
title_cn: 贝森特称鲍威尔留任“违反”了所有美联储规范
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent criticized Jerome Powell for his decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board after he steps down as the US central bank’s chair, saying it amounts to a break with Fed tradition.

title: US Seeks to Deploy Hypersonic Missile for the First Time Against Iran
title_cn: 美国寻求首次针对伊朗部署高超音速导弹
summary: US Central Command has asked to send the Army’s long-delayed Dark Eagle hypersonic missile to the Middle East for possible use against Iran, seeking a longer-range system to hit ballistic-missile launchers deep inside the country.

title: Mexico’s Sinaloa Governor Is Indicted in US on Drug Charges
title_cn: 墨西哥锡那罗亚州州长因毒品指控在美国被起诉
summary: The governor of the Mexican state of Sinaloa was accused by US prosecutors of conspiring with drug cartels, escalating tension between the two countries over the fight against organized crime.

title: Barrage of Big Tech Earnings Beat Estimates to Mixed Reaction
title_cn: 大型科技公司的盈利超过预期，反应不一
summary: Four tech giants beat analyst estimates as Amazon, Alphabet, Meta and Microsoft reported earnings after the bell, exposing a significant share of the market as traders reacted. Bloombeg's Ed Ludlow and Anurag Rana, along with Ron Westfall, HyperFRAME Research Infrastructure and Networking VP & practice leader, gave their initial reaction to the reports Meta shares fell in the immediate aftermarket after the company told investors it was increasing its capex for the year, citing rising AI investment costs. While Microsoft's cloud business narrowly beat estimates, it was not enough to ease concerns around its artificial intelligence strategy, as investors fear its not doing enough to capitalize on the AI market.  Alphabet beat estimates across the board, with results spurred particularly by strong growth in its cloud computing unit.  Amazon reported the largest cloud sales growth since 2022, bolstered by deals with Anthropic and OpenAI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Seeks Forfeiture of Iran-Linked Oil Tankers Seized at Sea
title_cn: 美国寻求没收在海上扣押的与伊朗有关的油轮
summary: The US is seeking forfeiture of two Iran-linked oil tankers seized by naval forces enforcing a blockade against the Islamic Republic, according to a senior White House official.

title: Trump Says He Rejects Iran Hormuz Offer, Keeps Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普表示他拒绝伊朗霍尔木兹的提议并继续封锁
summary: President Donald Trump told Axios he will not lift a naval blockade of Iran’s ports until he secures a deal with Tehran to address the country’s nuclear program, extending a standoff over the Strait of Hormuz that has caused a global energy crisis.

title: Supreme Court Decision on Minority Districts Will Have a Long Tail
title_cn: 最高法院关于少数族裔地区的裁决将有长尾效应
summary: The decision is likely to extend battles over redistricting for years.

title: What the Supreme Court Ruling Means for Race-Based Voting Districts
title_cn: 最高法院的裁决对基于种族的投票区意味着什么
summary: The Voting Rights Act of 1965 was a landmark law enacted to enforce voting protections enshrined in the US Constitution and eliminate longstanding obstacles to voter participation. In recent years, the Supreme Court’s conservative majority has repeatedly narrowed the scope of the 61-year-old law. On April 29, the court limited the use of the law to create predominantly Black or Hispanic election districts — its most important remaining component.

title: Former FBI Director Appears in Court for Second Indictment
title_cn: 前联邦调查局局长因第二次起诉出庭
summary: Former FBI Director James Comey made his initial court appearance Wednesday in response to federal criminal charges for allegedly threatening President Donald Trump’s life in a social media post.

title: Pentagon ‘Released’ $400 Million Ukraine Funding, Hegseth Says
title_cn: 赫格斯称五角大楼“发放”了 4 亿美元乌克兰资金
summary: Pentagon officials confirmed the release of $400 million in funds for Ukraine that already had been authorized by Congress, after the top Senate Republican overseeing defense spending criticized Pentagon leaders for withholding the money.

title: Florida Legislature Backs DeSantis Bid to Redraw Districts
title_cn: 佛罗里达州立法机构支持德桑蒂斯重新划分选区的提议
summary: Florida’s legislature on Wednesday backed Governor Ron DeSantis’ bid to redraw the state’s congressional districts in an effort to secure as many as four additional US House seats for Republicans in November’s midterm elections.

title: Hanwha to Build Armored Vehicles in Canada if It Wins Submarine Contract
title_cn: 如果赢得潜艇合同，韩华将在加拿大建造装甲车
summary: South Korea’s Hanwha Group said it will partner with Canadian auto parts firms to build armored vehicles if it wins a contract to build a new submarine fleet for Canada.

title: Supreme Court Told Trump’s End to Migrant Shield Not Driven by Race
title_cn: 最高法院告诉特朗普终止移民盾不是由种族驱动的
summary: The Trump administration told a divided US Supreme Court that past remarks by the president disparaging Haiti and immigrants weren’t racist and shouldn’t get in the way of the government stripping temporary protections for migrants.

title: Powell Says He'll Continue to Serve as Fed Governor, But With a 'Low Profile'
title_cn: 鲍威尔表示他将继续担任美联储理事，但“低调”
summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell says he'll continue to serve as a governor “for a period of time to be determined” but with a low profile. He speaks in Washington after the FOMC left interest rates unchanged.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Presses Putin on Ukraine Deal, Rebuffs Iran Nuclear Offer
title_cn: 特朗普就乌克兰协议向普京施压，拒绝伊朗核提议
summary: US President Donald Trump said he encouraged Vladimir Putin to conclude his war in Ukraine and rebuffed an offer from his Russian counterpart to help secure Iran’s nuclear material.

title: Press for New Capital Gains Tax Cut Divides Republicans
title_cn: 要求新的资本利得税减税的压力使共和党人产生分歧
summary: A push by influential Republican lawmakers to answer voters’ concerns about the cost of living by lowering taxes on capital gains is dividing the GOP ahead of November elections.

title: NY’s MTA Holds Impromptu Talks With Rail Unions as Strike Looms
title_cn: 罢工迫在眉睫，纽约 MTA 与铁路工会举行临时会谈
summary: Labor negotiations between New York City’s transit agency and Long Island Rail Road workers spontaneously kicked off on Wednesday, after a union leader spoke out at a board meeting.

title: Fed Chair Nominee Warsh Wins Key Senate Committee Vote | Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/29/2026
title_cn: 美联储主席提名人沃什赢得参议院委员会关键投票 |权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses a key Senate committee vote to advance Trump's nominee for Fed Chair Kevin Warsh ahead of Jerome Powell's last fed decision in his role as chair. On today's show, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Partner at Stonecourt Capital Rick Davis, and Republican Senator from West Virginia Shelley Moore Capito. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Farage Faulted for Not Reporting £5 Million From Crypto Investor
title_cn: Farage 因未报告加密货币投资者的 500 万英镑而受到指责
summary: Nigel Farage was accused by the governing Labour Party and opposition Conservatives of breaking parliamentary rules after the Reform UK leader acknowledged receiving a large private payment from crypto investor Christopher Harborne.

title: A Tiny Pin Stokes High-Stakes Rift Between Venezuela, Guyana
title_cn: 一颗小别针引发了委内瑞拉和圭亚那之间的高风险裂痕
summary: A tiny brooch worn by Venezuela’s new US-supported leader Delcy Rodríguez has become a diplomatic lightning rod.

title: Pentagon Says US Has Spent $25 Billion on Iran War So Far
title_cn: 五角大楼称美国迄今为止已在伊朗战争上花费了250亿美元
summary: Pentagon officials said the Iran war had cost $25 billion so far, offering the estimate in a contentious congressional hearing that saw Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth trade barbs with Democrats over the administration’s handling of the conflict.

title: Fed Chair Pick Kevin Warsh Wins Key Senate Committee Vote
title_cn: 美联储主席凯文·沃什赢得参议院委员会关键投票
summary: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s nominee to be the next chair of the Federal Reserve, won the backing of the Senate Banking Committee Wednesday on a 13-11 party-line vote, putting him on track to be confirmed by the full Senate before Jerome Powell’s term ends May 15.

title: DOT’s Duffy Pitches Fee to Help Pay for Air Traffic Upgrades
title_cn: DOT 的 Duffy Pitch 费用用于帮助支付空中交通升级费用
summary: US Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy floated the idea of charging a fee to help the US Federal Aviation Administration modernize its air traffic control system on a more regular basis.

title: UAE Quits OPEC, OpenAI Hits Back at Growth Fears | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/28/2026
title_cn: 阿联酋退出 OPEC，OpenAI 回击增长担忧 |彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 28 日
summary:
On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec discuss the latest in global markets. They discuss OpenAI's response to growth fears with Rudina Seseri, Glasswing Ventures Founder & Managing Partner, and King Charles III's visit to the US with Ed Price, Senior Fellow (non-resident) at New York University, and former British Trade Official. They also discuss how C-Suite is weighing growth with Mitch Berlin, EY Americas Vice Chair, EY-Parthenon.

Correction: The name chyron for Mitch Berlin should read EY-Parthenon (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Poised for Surprise Win in Key State, Exit Polls Show
title_cn: 出口民意调查显示，莫迪有望在关键州意外获胜
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi had a slight edge over his main rival in the key Indian state of West Bengal, exit polls from the closely contested election showed, giving the ruling party the chance to govern the region for the first time ever.

title: Texas Democrat Talarico Has Edge on Republicans in Senate Race
title_cn: 德克萨斯州民主党人塔拉里科在参议院竞选中领先于共和党人
summary: Texas Democrat James Talarico holds leads over both Republicans vying for the competitive US Senate seat, reflecting voters’ surging concerns about the cost of living and dimming views of President Donald Trump’s handling of the economy, according to a new poll by the University of Texas.

title: Trump Ally Nearer to Comeback in Slovenia After Vote on Cabinet
title_cn: 内阁投票后，特朗普盟友在斯洛文尼亚即将卷土重来
summary: Slovenia’s nationalist leader and ally of US President Donald Trump inched closer to his political comeback after a vote showed he now commands a majority in parliament.

title: Warsh Denies Any Connections to Epstein in Response to Warren
title_cn: 沃什回应沃伦，否认与爱泼斯坦有任何联系
summary: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s nominee to be the next chair of the Federal Reserve, denied connections to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein after his name was referenced in files on Epstein published by the Department of Justice.
